events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: undersized service entrance conductors is a **fail** (high risk). Per NEC 230.42, service conductors must have ampacity not less than the calculated load, and dwelling services have minimum sizing constraints (230.79(C)). This is a fire/overheating hazard that must be corrected — conductors replaced with properly sized ones per a verified load calculation — before the rough-in can be covered or energized.
